props.name: color1
props.description: Primary light color used in the gradient blend.

props.name: color2
props.description: Secondary accent color used in the gradient blend.

props.name: color3
props.description: Deep base color used in the gradient blend.

props.name: timeSpeed
props.description: Animation speed multiplier for the gradient motion.

props.name: colorBalance
props.description: Shifts the palette balance toward dark or lighter tones.

props.name: warpStrength
props.description: Strength of the wave warp distortion (0 = none).

props.name: warpFrequency
props.description: Frequency of the wave warp.

props.name: warpSpeed
props.description: Speed multiplier for the warp animation.

props.name: warpAmplitude
props.description: Base amplitude for the warp distortion.

props.name: blendAngle
props.description: Rotation angle for the color blend axis (degrees).

props.name: blendSoftness
props.description: Softens the blend edges between color layers.

props.name: rotationAmount
props.description: Rotation amount driven by noise.

props.name: noiseScale
props.description: Scales the noise frequency that drives rotation.

props.name: grainAmount
props.description: Amount of film grain applied to the gradient.

props.name: grainScale
props.description: Scale of the grain pattern.

props.name: grainAnimated
props.description: Animate grain over time.

props.name: contrast
props.description: Overall contrast applied to the final color.

props.name: gamma
props.description: Gamma correction for the final color.

props.name: saturation
props.description: Saturation amount for the final color.

props.name: centerX
props.description: Horizontal offset of the gradient center.

props.name: centerY
props.description: Vertical offset of the gradient center.

props.name: zoom
props.description: Zoom level for the gradient field.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the container.
